title: Genetic variants affecting NQO1 protein levels impact on efficacy of idebenone treatment in Leber hereditary optic neuropathy
author: Fiorini, Claudio
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.title: Fastq files with complete sequencing of...
steps.instruction: Fastq files with complete sequencing of NQO1 gene after PCR amplification for cell lines harboring m.11778G>A/MT-ND4 or m.3460A>G/MT-ND1 and controls.
